description_long: This is a brown leather chukka boot with a rounded toe and visible stitching along the sole and upper. The shoe features a standard lace-up closure with light-colored laces threaded through two pairs of eyelets. The leather upper shows natural creasing and patina, indicating some wear and use. The sole is flat, made of a darker material, and has a slight heel, with visible stitching attaching it to the upper. The interior appears to be lined with a softer material for comfort. The overall design is classic and versatile, suitable for urban environments and casual to semi-formal attire.
description: A brown leather chukka boot with light laces, visible stitching, and a slightly worn, classic appearance.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the heel, stitching details, and the back seam of the shoe.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth leather upper, stitching, and the full length of the sole.
description_view_2: Front three-quarter view displaying the rounded toe, lacing, and the shoe's overall shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the outer side panel, stitching, and the heel profile.
